redirect_error: Failed to redirect to SSO provider

errors.EMAIL_NOT_FOUND: The SSO provider did not return an email address.
errors.EMAIL_MISMATCH: The SSO provider email does not match your account email.
errors.EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED: The email returned by the SSO provider is not verified.
errors.PROVIDER_NOT_CONFIGURED: This SSO provider is not configured.
errors.PROVIDER_NOT_ALLOWED: This SSO provider is not allowed for this tenant.
errors.SOCIAL_LOGIN_DISABLED: Social login is disabled for this tenant.
errors.TOKEN_EXCHANGE_FAILED: Failed to exchange the authorization code for tokens.
